topic: AI-based automatic defect detection in high-resolution 6559x6559 grayscale semiconductor source images using normal-only reference patches
model_architecture: DefectDetectionModel — Frozen WideResNet-50 backbone + FAISS IVF-PQ reference bank + LoSAIN normalization + EVT threshold calibration

expected_behavior.smoke_test: reference bank 구축 후 FPR, AUROC, inference_time 출력
expected_behavior.success_signal: METRICS 줄에 auroc, false_positive_rate, inference_time 키 포함
